title: Savory Crumbly Peruvian Beef Kidney Crock Pot Crumble
description: A light and flavorful crumble made with tender beef kidneys, seasoned with traditional Peruvian spices and cooked in a slow cooker for an easy weeknight meal.
instructions: Pat the kidneys dry with paper towels.
Sprinkle salt, black peppercorns, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and cayenne pepper over both sides of the kidneys. Toss to coat evenly.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the seasoned kidneys and cook until nicely browned on all sides (about 5-7 minutes per side).
Transfer kidneys to slow cooker. Pour in lime juice, and add any accumulated juices from the skillet. Stir gently.
Cook on low for 4 hours or high for 2 hours. Serve with a sprinkle of chopped cilantro over the top.
To make crumbles ahead of time, cool thoroughly before scooping into a muffin tin-lined baking dish and refrigerate overnight. Top with remaining ground cumin just before serving.
